{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230414383B40AA7CDF883B04F133"}"},"total":5646},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7302739904567558962","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看到了最新章节，虽然是无敌流，但是战力没怎么崩坏，剧情也不老套。这本书如果在某点的三江上我可能不会太惊讶，但在番茄，我只能说[赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1700302857,"group_id":"7279089760491015202","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看书而已，别找骂","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyGAlezqn1jubx37N0RN1MZoMsWEaMUI0kYRyJz1+2al","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"4358112237585133","user_name":"谓夜将尽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4358112237585133","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1801614155,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7279089760491015202","book_info":{"abstract":"【无敌+畅快升级+大佬+穿书】
  林泽穿越到了小说世界，成了一个反派配角，好在觉醒了神级悟性的天赋。
  1级天赋能极速领悟功法，2级天赋能推演功法境界，3级天赋能融合功法，4级天赋……
  “你领悟了八荒战法，八荒战法lv9。”
  “你推演了真火圣魔诀，真火圣魔诀lv10。”
  “你融合了大荒真焱功和魅影神功，创造了荒焱魔影神功，荒焱魔影神功获得突破晋升为地级极品。”
  于是，林泽就这样踏上了一条无敌之路！
  而随着林泽的无敌，他发现自己穿越这个小说世界似乎出了‘亿’点问题！
  原来的小说主角消失不见了！！
  而以前恨他要死的女主角们竟然都赖上了他！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6b0c8ddf155549165a5e59ee72a3fc5f","author":"七月飞星","author_id":"","book_id":"7279089760491015202","book_name":"开局无敌的我，撕烂剧本","book_short_name":"万法天帝","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7279090355440452096","read_count":"69822","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"504886"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"249","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,
